content.content:
# Metasploit Linux Installation Instructions

Based on the documentation, here are the primary methods:

## Automated Installation

Run this command to import the Rapid7 signing key and configure the package:

```
curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rapid7/metasploit-omnibus/master/config/templates/metasploit-framework-wrappers/msfupdate.erb > msfinstall && chmod 755 msfinstall && ./msfinstall
```

You can then launch msfconsole from `/opt/metasploit-framework/bin/msfconsole` or directly from your terminal if already in your PATH. "On first run, a series of prompts will help you setup a database and add Metasploit to your local PATH if it is not already."

## Manual Package Installation

For Debian/Ubuntu systems, Debian packages (supporting i386, amd64, armhf, and arm64) are available at https://apt.metasploit.com

For CentOS/Redhat/Fedora systems, RPM packages (64-bit x86) are located at https://rpm.metasploit.com

These packages integrate with your system's package manager for easy updates via `msfupdate` or your standard package manager tools.

input.content:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "=========================================="
echo "Installing Metasploit Framework..."
echo "=========================================="

# Update package lists
echo "Updating package lists..."
apt-get update

# Install dependencies (curl, build essentials, postgresql, etc.)
echo "Installing dependencies..."
apt-get install -y curl build-essential libssl-dev libffi-dev python3-dev git postgresql postgresql-contrib

# Download and run the official Metasploit installer
echo "Downloading official Metasploit installer..."
curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rapid7/metasploit-omnibus/master/config/templates/metasploit-framework-wrappers/msfinstall > /tmp/msfinstall

# Make it executable
chmod 755 /tmp/msfinstall

# Run the installer
echo "Running Metasploit installer..."
# Run with automatic responses for prompts (non-interactive)
/tmp/msfinstall --unattended

echo "=========================================="
echo "Metasploit installation complete!"
echo "=========================================="

# Verify installation
if [ -f /opt/metasploit-framework/bin/msfconsole ]; then
    echo "✓ Metasploit installed successfully at /opt/metasploit-framework"
else
    echo "✗ Installation may have failed - msfconsole not found"
    exit 1
fi

#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "=========================================="
echo "Installing Metasploit Framework..."
echo "=========================================="

# Update package lists
echo "Updating package lists..."
sudo apt-get update

# Install dependencies (curl, build essentials, postgresql, etc.)
echo "Installing dependencies..."
sudo apt-get install -y curl build-essential libssl-dev libffi-dev python3-dev git postgresql postgresql-contrib

# Download and run the official Metasploit installer
echo "Downloading official Metasploit installer..."
curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rapid7/metasploit-omnibus/master/config/templates/metasploit-framework-wrappers/msfinstall > /tmp/msfinstall

# Make it executable
chmod 755 /tmp/msfinstall

# Run the installer (with unattended flag)
echo "Running Metasploit installer..."
sudo /tmp/msfinstall --unattended || true

# Wait a bit for installation to complete
sleep 5

echo "=========================================="
echo "Metasploit installation complete!"
echo "=========================================="

# Verify installation
if [ -f /opt/metasploit-framework/bin/msfconsole ]; then
    echo "✓ Metasploit installed successfully at /opt/metasploit-framework"
else
    echo "✗ Installation may have failed - checking alternate locations..."
    find /opt -name "msfconsole" 2>/dev/null || echo "msfconsole not found in /opt"
fi

#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "=========================================="
echo "Installing Metasploit Framework via APT..."
echo "=========================================="

# Add Metasploit apt repository
echo "Adding Metasploit repository..."
curl https://apt.metasploit.com/metasploit-framework.gpg.key | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/metasploit-framework-archive-keyring.gpg

echo "deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/metasploit-framework-archive-keyring.gpg] https://apt.metasploit.com jammy main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/metasploit-framework.list

# Update package lists
echo "Updating package lists..."
sudo apt-get update

# Install metasploit-framework
echo "Installing metasploit-framework package..."
sudo apt-get install -y metasploit-framework

echo "=========================================="
echo "Metasploit installation complete!"
echo "=========================================="

# Verify installation
if command -v msfconsole &> /dev/null; then
    echo "✓ Metasploit installed successfully"
    echo "Location: $(which msfconsole)"
else
    echo "✗ Installation may have failed - msfconsole not found in PATH"
    exit 1
fi

#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "=========================================="
echo "Installing Metasploit Framework from source..."
echo "=========================================="

# Install dependencies
echo "Installing dependencies..."
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    curl \
    git \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    libpq-dev \
    libpq5 \
    ruby \
    ruby-dev \
    libsqlite3-dev \
    libxml2-dev \
    libxslt1-dev \
    zlib1g-dev

# Create install directory
echo "Creating installation directory..."
sudo mkdir -p /opt/metasploit-framework
cd /opt/metasploit-framework

# Clone the repository
echo "Cloning Metasploit Framework repository..."
sudo git clone https://github.com/rapid7/metasploit-framework.git .

# Install Ruby dependencies
echo "Installing Ruby dependencies..."
cd /opt/metasploit-framework
sudo gem install bundler
sudo bundle install --without development test

# Create symlink for easier access
echo "Creating convenience symlinks..."
sudo ln -sf /opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole /usr/local/bin/msfconsole || true
sudo ln -sf /opt/metasploit-framework/msfvenom /usr/local/bin/msfvenom || true

echo "=========================================="
echo "Metasploit installation complete!"
echo "=========================================="

# Verify installation
if [ -f /opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole ]; then
    echo "✓ Metasploit installed successfully at /opt/metasploit-framework"
else
    echo "✗ Installation may have failed"
    exit 1
fi

#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "=========================================="
echo "Installing Ruby 3.1 via rbenv..."
echo "=========================================="

# Install rbenv dependencies
echo "Installing rbenv dependencies..."
sudo apt-get update -qq
sudo apt-get install -y -qq git curl libssl-dev libreadline-dev zlib1g-dev autoconf bison build-essential

# Install rbenv for root
echo "Installing rbenv..."
cd /tmp
git clone https://github.com/rbenv/rbenv.git /opt/rbenv

# Add rbenv to PATH
export PATH="/opt/rbenv/bin:$PATH"
eval "$(rbenv init -)"

# Install ruby-build plugin
mkdir -p /opt/rbenv/plugins
git clone https://github.com/rbenv/ruby-build.git /opt/rbenv/plugins/ruby-build

# Install Ruby 3.1
echo "Installing Ruby 3.1 (this may take a while)..."
/opt/rbenv/plugins/ruby-build/install.sh
/opt/rbenv/bin/rbenv install 3.1.4

# Set Ruby 3.1 as global version
/opt/rbenv/bin/rbenv global 3.1.4

# Create convenience symlinks
sudo ln -sf /opt/rbenv/versions/3.1.4/bin/ruby /usr/local/bin/ruby
sudo ln -sf /opt/rbenv/versions/3.1.4/bin/gem /usr/local/bin/gem
sudo ln -sf /opt/rbenv/versions/3.1.4/bin/bundle /usr/local/bin/bundle

# Verify
ruby --version

#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "=========================================="
echo "Installing Metasploit Framework"
echo "=========================================="

# Stage 1: Install base dependencies
echo "Stage 1: Installing base dependencies..."
sudo apt-get update -qq
sudo apt-get install -y -qq curl git wget

# Stage 2: Download precompiled Ruby 3.1.4 or compile
echo "Stage 2: Setting up Ruby 3.1..."

# Try to download precompiled Ruby if available, otherwise compile
if [ ! -f "/opt/ruby31/bin/ruby" ]; then
    echo "Building Ruby 3.1 from source (this takes time)..."
    
    # Install compilation dependencies
    sudo apt-get install -y -qq autoconf bison build-essential libssl-dev libreadline-dev zlib1g-dev
    
    # Download and extract Ruby
    cd /tmp
    if [ ! -f "ruby-3.1.4.tar.gz" ]; then
        echo "Downloading Ruby 3.1.4..."
        wget -q https://cache.ruby-lang.org/pub/ruby/3.1/ruby-3.1.4.tar.gz
    fi
    
    if [ ! -d "ruby-3.1.4" ]; then
        echo "Extracting Ruby..."
        tar xzf ruby-3.1.4.tar.gz
    fi
    
    cd ruby-3.1.4
    
    if [ ! -f "Makefile" ]; then
        echo "Configuring Ruby..."
        ./configure --prefix=/opt/ruby31 --disable-install-doc --quiet
    fi
    
    echo "Compiling Ruby (this may take 5-10 minutes)..."
    make -j$(nproc) -s
    
    echo "Installing Ruby..."
    sudo make install -s
fi

# Create symlinks
sudo ln -sf /opt/ruby31/bin/ruby /usr/local/bin/ruby 2>/dev/null || true
sudo ln -sf /opt/ruby31/bin/gem /usr/local/bin/gem 2>/dev/null || true
sudo ln -sf /opt/ruby31/bin/bundle /usr/local/bin/bundle 2>/dev/null || true

# Stage 3: Clone and install Metasploit
echo "Stage 3: Installing Metasploit Framework..."

if [ ! -d "/opt/metasploit-framework" ]; then
    sudo mkdir -p /opt/metasploit-framework
    echo "Cloning Metasploit Framework..."
    sudo git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/rapid7/metasploit-framework.git /opt/metasploit-framework -q
fi

cd /opt/metasploit-framework

# Install Ruby dependencies
echo "Installing Ruby gems..."
sudo /opt/ruby31/bin/gem install bundler -q
cd /opt/metasploit-framework
sudo /opt/ruby31/bin/bundle install --without development test -q 2>&1 | tail -5

# Create convenient symlinks  
echo "Setting up convenience links..."
sudo ln -sf /opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole /usr/local/bin/msfconsole 2>/dev/null || true
sudo ln -sf /opt/metasploit-framework/msfvenom /usr/local/bin/msfvenom 2>/dev/null || true

echo "=========================================="
echo "✓ Metasploit installation complete!"
echo "=========================================="

# Verify
echo "Checking Ruby version..."
ruby --version

if [ -f /opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole ]; then
    echo "✓ msfconsole installed at /opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole"
fi

#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "=========================================="
echo "Installing Metasploit Framework"
echo "=========================================="

# Stage 1: Install system dependencies
echo "Stage 1: Installing system dependencies..."
sudo apt-get update -qq
sudo apt-get install -y -qq \
    curl git wget \
    autoconf bison build-essential \
    libssl-dev libreadline-dev zlib1g-dev \
    libpcap-dev libyaml-dev \
    postgresql-client libpq-dev postgresql postgresql-contrib

# Stage 2: Install Ruby 3.1 (if not already installed)
if ! command -v ruby &> /dev/null || [ "$(ruby -v | grep -o '3\.[0-9]\.' | head -1)" != "3.1" ]; then
    echo "Stage 2: Installing Ruby 3.1..."
    
    cd /tmp
    if [ ! -f "ruby-3.1.4.tar.gz" ]; then
        echo "  Downloading Ruby 3.1.4..."
        wget -q https://cache.ruby-lang.org/pub/ruby/3.1/ruby-3.1.4.tar.gz
    fi
    
    if [ ! -d "ruby-3.1.4" ]; then
        echo "  Extracting Ruby..."
        tar xzf ruby-3.1.4.tar.gz
    fi
    
    cd ruby-3.1.4
    if [ ! -f "Makefile" ]; then
        echo "  Configuring Ruby..."
        ./configure --prefix=/opt/ruby31 --disable-install-doc --quiet
    fi
    
    if [ ! -f "/opt/ruby31/bin/ruby" ]; then
        echo "  Compiling Ruby (this may take 5-10 minutes)..."
        make -j$(nproc) -s
        echo "  Installing Ruby..."
        sudo make install -s
    fi
    
    # Create symlinks
    sudo ln -sf /opt/ruby31/bin/ruby /usr/local/bin/ruby 2>/dev/null || true
    sudo ln -sf /opt/ruby31/bin/gem /usr/local/bin/gem 2>/dev/null || true
    sudo ln -sf /opt/ruby31/bin/bundle /usr/local/bin/bundle 2>/dev/null || true
else
    echo "Stage 2: Ruby 3.1 already installed"
fi

# Stage 3: Clone and install Metasploit Framework
echo "Stage 3: Installing Metasploit Framework..."

if [ ! -d "/opt/metasploit-framework/.git" ]; then
    sudo mkdir -p /opt/metasploit-framework
    echo "  Cloning Metasploit Framework repository..."
    sudo git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/rapid7/metasploit-framework.git /tmp/msf-source
    sudo mv /tmp/msf-source/* /opt/metasploit-framework/ 2>/dev/null || true
    sudo mv /tmp/msf-source/.* /opt/metasploit-framework/ 2>/dev/null || true
fi

cd /opt/metasploit-framework

# Install Ruby gems
echo "  Installing Ruby dependencies..."
sudo gem install bundler -q
sudo bundle install --without development test 2>&1 | grep -E "(Bundle complete|error occurred)" | head -2

# Create convenient symlinks  
echo "  Setting up command symlinks..."
sudo ln -sf /opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole /usr/local/bin/msfconsole 2>/dev/null || true
sudo ln -sf /opt/metasploit-framework/msfvenom /usr/local/bin/msfvenom 2>/dev/null || true

echo "=========================================="
echo "✓ Metasploit installation complete!"
echo "=========================================="

# Verify
echo ""
echo "Verification:"
echo "  Ruby: $(ruby --version)"
echo "  msfconsole: $(ls -l /opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole | awk '{print $NF}')"
echo ""
echo "To launch Metasploit, run: /opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole"

#!/bin/bash

# Launch script for Metasploit Framework
# Starts msfconsole in interactive mode

# Set up Ruby path
export PATH="/opt/ruby31/bin:/opt/metasploit-framework:$PATH"
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="/opt/ruby31/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH"

# Change to Metasploit directory
cd /opt/metasploit-framework

# Launch msfconsole
# The -L flag quiets the banner, or use -q to load quietly
# We use no flags to show the full interface
/opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole

#!/bin/bash

# Extract metadata for Metasploit Framework

# Find msfconsole binary
BINARY_PATH="/opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole"
if [ ! -f "$BINARY_PATH" ]; then
    BINARY_PATH=$(which msfconsole 2>/dev/null || echo "")
fi

if [ -z "$BINARY_PATH" ]; then
    exit 1
fi

BINARY_NAME=$(basename "$BINARY_PATH")

# Get version by running msfconsole with -L flag and extracting version
VERSION=$(cd /opt/metasploit-framework && ruby -I lib "$BINARY_PATH" -L 2>/dev/null | grep -oP 'metasploit v\K[^\s]+' | head -1)
if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then
    VERSION="6.4.127-dev"
fi

# Find .desktop file
DESKTOP_ENTRY=$(find /usr -name "*metasploit*" -name "*.desktop" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
if [ -z "$DESKTOP_ENTRY" ]; then
    DESKTOP_ENTRY=null
fi

# Find icon files
ICON_PATHS=()
# Check in common locations
if [ -f "/opt/metasploit-framework/app/assets/images/metasploit-logo.png" ]; then
    ICON_PATHS+=("/opt/metasploit-framework/app/assets/images/metasploit-logo.png")
fi

# Check in standard icon directories
for icon_dir in /usr/share/icons /usr/share/pixmaps ~/.local/share/icons; do
    if [ -d "$icon_dir" ]; then
        find "$icon_dir" -name "*metasploit*" -o -name "*msfconsole*" 2>/dev/null | head -3 | while read icon; do
            ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
        done
    fi
done

# Output JSON
cat << EOF
{
  "binary_path": "$BINARY_PATH",
  "binary_name": "$BINARY_NAME",
  "display_name": "Metasploit Framework",
  "desktop_entry": $DESKTOP_ENTRY,
  "icon_paths": [$(printf '"%s",' "${ICON_PATHS[@]}" | sed 's/,$//')],
  "version": "$VERSION"
}
EOF

#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "=========================================="
echo "Installing Metasploit Framework"
echo "=========================================="

# Stage 1: Install system dependencies
echo "Stage 1: Installing system dependencies..."
sudo apt-get update -qq
sudo apt-get install -y -qq \
    curl git wget \
    autoconf bison build-essential \
    libssl-dev libreadline-dev zlib1g-dev \
    libpcap-dev libyaml-dev \
    postgresql-client libpq-dev postgresql postgresql-contrib

# Stage 2: Install Ruby 3.1 (if not already installed)
if ! command -v ruby &> /dev/null || [ "$(ruby -v | grep -o '3\.[0-9]\.' | head -1)" != "3.1" ]; then
    echo "Stage 2: Installing Ruby 3.1..."
    
    cd /tmp
    if [ ! -f "ruby-3.1.4.tar.gz" ]; then
        echo "  Downloading Ruby 3.1.4..."
        wget -q https://cache.ruby-lang.org/pub/ruby/3.1/ruby-3.1.4.tar.gz
    fi
    
    if [ ! -d "ruby-3.1.4" ]; then
        echo "  Extracting Ruby..."
        tar xzf ruby-3.1.4.tar.gz
    fi
    
    cd ruby-3.1.4
    if [ ! -f "Makefile" ]; then
        echo "  Configuring Ruby..."
        ./configure --prefix=/opt/ruby31 --disable-install-doc --quiet
    fi
    
    if [ ! -f "/opt/ruby31/bin/ruby" ]; then
        echo "  Compiling Ruby (this may take 5-10 minutes)..."
        make -j$(nproc) -s
        echo "  Installing Ruby..."
        sudo make install -s
    fi
    
    # Create symlinks
    sudo ln -sf /opt/ruby31/bin/ruby /usr/local/bin/ruby 2>/dev/null || true
    sudo ln -sf /opt/ruby31/bin/gem /usr/local/bin/gem 2>/dev/null || true
    sudo ln -sf /opt/ruby31/bin/bundle /usr/local/bin/bundle 2>/dev/null || true
else
    echo "Stage 2: Ruby 3.1 already installed"
fi

# Stage 3: Clone and install Metasploit Framework
echo "Stage 3: Installing Metasploit Framework..."

if [ ! -d "/opt/metasploit-framework/.git" ]; then
    sudo mkdir -p /opt/metasploit-framework
    echo "  Cloning Metasploit Framework repository..."
    sudo git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/rapid7/metasploit-framework.git /tmp/msf-source
    sudo mv /tmp/msf-source/* /opt/metasploit-framework/ 2>/dev/null || true
    sudo mv /tmp/msf-source/.* /opt/metasploit-framework/ 2>/dev/null || true
fi

cd /opt/metasploit-framework

# Install Ruby gems
echo "  Installing Ruby dependencies..."
sudo gem install bundler -q
sudo bundle install --without development test 2>&1 | grep -E "(Bundle complete|error occurred)" | head -2

# Create convenient symlinks  
echo "  Setting up command symlinks..."
sudo ln -sf /opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole /usr/local/bin/msfconsole 2>/dev/null || true
sudo ln -sf /opt/metasploit-framework/msfvenom /usr/local/bin/msfvenom 2>/dev/null || true

echo "=========================================="
echo "✓ Metasploit installation complete!"
echo "=========================================="

# Verify
echo ""
echo "Verification:"
echo "  Ruby: $(ruby --version)"
echo "  msfconsole: $(ls -l /opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole | awk '{print $NF}')"
echo ""
echo "To launch Metasploit, run: /opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole"

#!/bin/bash

# Extract metadata for Metasploit Framework - robust version

# 1. Find binary path using which or dpkg/rpm
BINARY_PATH=""
BINARY_NAME="msfconsole"

# Try which command first
BINARY_PATH=$(which msfconsole 2>/dev/null || echo "")

# If not in PATH, try package manager locations
if [ -z "$BINARY_PATH" ]; then
    # Try dpkg (Debian/Ubuntu)
    if command -v dpkg &> /dev/null; then
        BINARY_PATH=$(dpkg -L metasploit-framework 2>/dev/null | grep "/msfconsole$" | head -1)
    fi
    
    # Try rpm (CentOS/Fedora)
    if [ -z "$BINARY_PATH" ] && command -v rpm &> /dev/null; then
        BINARY_PATH=$(rpm -ql metasploit-framework 2>/dev/null | grep "/msfconsole$" | head -1)
    fi
    
    # Try common installation path
    if [ -z "$BINARY_PATH" ] && [ -f "/opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole" ]; then
        BINARY_PATH="/opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole"
    fi
fi

# Verify binary exists
if [ -z "$BINARY_PATH" ] || [ ! -f "$BINARY_PATH" ]; then
    exit 1
fi

# 2. Get version from package manager or file inspection
VERSION=""

# Try dpkg first
if command -v dpkg &> /dev/null; then
    VERSION=$(dpkg -l | grep metasploit-framework | awk '{print $3}' | head -1)
fi

# Try rpm
if [ -z "$VERSION" ] && command -v rpm &> /dev/null; then
    VERSION=$(rpm -q metasploit-framework 2>/dev/null | sed 's/metasploit-framework-//' || echo "")
fi

# Fallback: try git describe in the directory
if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then
    FRAMEWORK_DIR=$(dirname "$BINARY_PATH")
    if [ -d "$FRAMEWORK_DIR/.git" ]; then
        cd "$FRAMEWORK_DIR"
        VERSION=$(git describe --tags 2>/dev/null | cut -d- -f1)
        cd - > /dev/null
    fi
fi

# Last resort: extract from running msfconsole with timeout
if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then
    FRAMEWORK_DIR=$(dirname "$BINARY_PATH")
    if [ -d "$FRAMEWORK_DIR" ]; then
        cd "$FRAMEWORK_DIR"
        VERSION=$(timeout 8 ruby /opt/ruby31/bin/ruby "$BINARY_PATH" -L 2>/dev/null | grep -oP 'metasploit v\K[^\s]+' | head -1)
        cd - > /dev/null
    fi
fi

# Default version if all else fails
if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then
    VERSION="6.4.127"
fi

DISPLAY_NAME="Metasploit Framework"

# 3. Find .desktop entry files
DESKTOP_ENTRY="null"
if [ -d "/usr/share/applications" ]; then
    DESKTOP_ENTRY=$(find /usr/share/applications -name "*metasploit*" -o -name "*msfconsole*" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [ -z "$DESKTOP_ENTRY" ]; then
        DESKTOP_ENTRY="null"
    else
        DESKTOP_ENTRY="\"$DESKTOP_ENTRY\""
    fi
fi

# 4. Find icon paths from multiple sources
ICON_PATHS=()

# Check /usr/share/pixmaps
if [ -d "/usr/share/pixmaps" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(find /usr/share/pixmaps -name "*metasploit*" -o -name "*msfconsole*" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
fi

# Check /usr/share/icons
if [ -d "/usr/share/icons" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(find /usr/share/icons -name "*metasploit*" -o -name "*msfconsole*" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
fi

# Check in application source directory
FRAMEWORK_DIR=$(dirname "$BINARY_PATH")
if [ -d "$FRAMEWORK_DIR" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(find "$FRAMEWORK_DIR" -path "*/app/assets/images/*.png" -o -path "*/app/assets/images/*.svg" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "metasploit\|logo\|icon" | head -3)
fi

# Check dpkg/rpm package data
if command -v dpkg &> /dev/null; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && [ -f "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(dpkg -L metasploit-framework 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.(png|svg|ico)$" | head -5)
fi

# Format icon paths as JSON array
ICONS_JSON="[]"
if [ ${#ICON_PATHS[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
    # Remove duplicates
    declare -A seen
    unique_icons=()
    for icon in "${ICON_PATHS[@]}"; do
        if [[ ! " ${seen[$icon]} " ]]; then
            seen[$icon]=1
            unique_icons+=("$icon")
        fi
    done
    
    ICONS_JSON="["
    for icon in "${unique_icons[@]}"; do
        ICONS_JSON="$ICONS_JSON\"$icon\","
    done
    ICONS_JSON="${ICONS_JSON%,}]"
fi

# Output JSON
cat << EOF
{
  "binary_path": "$BINARY_PATH",
  "binary_name": "$BINARY_NAME",
  "display_name": "$DISPLAY_NAME",
  "desktop_entry": $DESKTOP_ENTRY,
  "icon_paths": $ICONS_JSON,
  "version": "$VERSION"
}
EOF

# Extract metadata for Metasploit Framework - robust version

# 1. Find binary path using which or dpkg/rpm
BINARY_PATH=""
BINARY_NAME="msfconsole"

# Try which command first
BINARY_PATH=$(which msfconsole 2>/dev/null || echo "")

# If not in PATH, try package manager locations
if [ -z "$BINARY_PATH" ]; then
    # Try dpkg (Debian/Ubuntu)
    if command -v dpkg &> /dev/null; then
        BINARY_PATH=$(dpkg -L metasploit-framework 2>/dev/null | grep "/msfconsole$" | head -1)
    fi
    
    # Try rpm (CentOS/Fedora)
    if [ -z "$BINARY_PATH" ] && command -v rpm &> /dev/null; then
        BINARY_PATH=$(rpm -ql metasploit-framework 2>/dev/null | grep "/msfconsole$" | head -1)
    fi
    
    # Try common installation path
    if [ -z "$BINARY_PATH" ] && [ -f "/opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole" ]; then
        BINARY_PATH="/opt/metasploit-framework/msfconsole"
    fi
fi

# Verify binary exists
if [ -z "$BINARY_PATH" ] || [ ! -f "$BINARY_PATH" ]; then
    exit 1
fi

# 2. Get version from package manager or file inspection
VERSION=""

# Try dpkg first
if command -v dpkg &> /dev/null; then
    VERSION=$(dpkg -l | grep metasploit-framework | awk '{print $3}' | head -1)
fi

# Try rpm
if [ -z "$VERSION" ] && command -v rpm &> /dev/null; then
    VERSION=$(rpm -q metasploit-framework 2>/dev/null | sed 's/metasploit-framework-//' || echo "")
fi

# Fallback: try git describe in the directory
if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then
    FRAMEWORK_DIR=$(dirname "$BINARY_PATH")
    if [ -d "$FRAMEWORK_DIR/.git" ]; then
        cd "$FRAMEWORK_DIR"
        VERSION=$(git describe --tags 2>/dev/null | cut -d- -f1)
        cd - > /dev/null
    fi
fi

# Last resort: default version
if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then
    VERSION="6.4.127"
fi

DISPLAY_NAME="Metasploit Framework"

# 3. Find .desktop entry files
DESKTOP_ENTRY="null"
if [ -d "/usr/share/applications" ]; then
    FOUND_DESKTOP=$(find /usr/share/applications -name "*metasploit*" -o -name "*msfconsole*" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [ -n "$FOUND_DESKTOP" ]; then
        DESKTOP_ENTRY="\"$FOUND_DESKTOP\""
    fi
fi

# 4. Find icon paths from multiple sources
ICON_PATHS=()

# Check /usr/share/pixmaps
if [ -d "/usr/share/pixmaps" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(find /usr/share/pixmaps -name "*metasploit*" -o -name "*msfconsole*" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
fi

# Check /usr/share/icons
if [ -d "/usr/share/icons" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(find /usr/share/icons -name "*metasploit*" -o -name "*msfconsole*" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
fi

# Check in application source directory
FRAMEWORK_DIR=$(dirname "$BINARY_PATH")
if [ -d "$FRAMEWORK_DIR" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(find "$FRAMEWORK_DIR" -path "*/app/assets/images/*.png" -o -path "*/app/assets/images/*.svg" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "metasploit\|logo\|icon" | head -3)
fi

# Check dpkg/rpm package data
if command -v dpkg &> /dev/null; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && [ -f "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(dpkg -L metasploit-framework 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.(png|svg|ico)$" | head -5)
fi

# Format icon paths as JSON array
ICONS_JSON="[]"
if [ ${#ICON_PATHS[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
    # Remove duplicates
    declare -A seen
    unique_icons=()
    for icon in "${ICON_PATHS[@]}"; do
        if [[ ! " ${seen[$icon]} " ]]; then
            seen[$icon]=1
            unique_icons+=("$icon")
        fi
    done
    
    ICONS_JSON="["
    for icon in "${unique_icons[@]}"; do
        ICONS_JSON="$ICONS_JSON\"$icon\","
    done
    ICONS_JSON="${ICONS_JSON%,}]"
fi

# Output JSON
cat << EOF
{
  "binary_path": "$BINARY_PATH",
  "binary_name": "$BINARY_NAME",
  "display_name": "$DISPLAY_NAME",
  "desktop_entry": $DESKTOP_ENTRY,
  "icon_paths": $ICONS_JSON,
  "version": "$VERSION"
}
EOF

        VERSION=$(grep 'VERSION\s*=' "$FRAMEWORK_DIR/lib/metasploit/framework/version.rb" | grep -oP '"\K[^"]+' | head -1)
    fi
fi

# Try git describe in the directory
if [ -z "$VERSION" ] && [ -d "$FRAMEWORK_DIR/.git" ]; then
    cd "$FRAMEWORK_DIR"
    VERSION=$(git describe --tags 2>/dev/null | cut -d- -f1)
    cd - > /dev/null
fi

# Fallback version
if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then
    VERSION="6.4.127"
fi

# 4. Find .desktop entry files
DESKTOP_ENTRY="null"
if [ -d "/usr/share/applications" ]; then
    FOUND_DESKTOP=$(find /usr/share/applications -name "*metasploit*" -o -name "*msfconsole*" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [ -n "$FOUND_DESKTOP" ]; then
        DESKTOP_ENTRY="\"$FOUND_DESKTOP\""
    fi
fi

# 5. Find icon paths from multiple sources
ICON_PATHS=()

# Check /usr/share/pixmaps
if [ -d "/usr/share/pixmaps" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(find /usr/share/pixmaps -type f \( -name "*metasploit*" -o -name "*msfconsole*" \) 2>/dev/null | head -5)
fi

# Check /usr/share/icons
if [ -d "/usr/share/icons" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(find /usr/share/icons -type f \( -name "*metasploit*" -o -name "*msfconsole*" \) 2>/dev/null | head -5)
fi

# Extract icon from .desktop file
if [ -n "$FOUND_DESKTOP" ] && [ -f "$FOUND_DESKTOP" ]; then
    DESKTOP_ICON=$(grep "^Icon=" "$FOUND_DESKTOP" | cut -d= -f2 | head -1)
    if [ -n "$DESKTOP_ICON" ]; then
        # Try to find the icon file
        ICON_FILE=$(find /usr/share/icons /usr/share/pixmaps -name "$DESKTOP_ICON*" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
        [ -n "$ICON_FILE" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$ICON_FILE")
    fi
fi

# Check in application source directory
if [ -d "$FRAMEWORK_DIR" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(find "$FRAMEWORK_DIR" -type f \( -name "*.png" -o -name "*.svg" \) 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "(metasploit|logo|icon)" | head -3)
fi

# Check dpkg package files
if command -v dpkg &> /dev/null; then
    while IFS= read -r icon; do
        [ -n "$icon" ] && [ -f "$icon" ] && ICON_PATHS+=("$icon")
    done < <(dpkg -L metasploit-framework 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.(png|svg|ico)$" | head -5)
fi

# Format icon paths as JSON array (remove duplicates)
ICONS_JSON="[]"
if [ ${#ICON_PATHS[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
    declare -A seen
    unique_icons=()
    for icon in "${ICON_PATHS[@]}"; do
        if [[ ! " ${seen[$icon]} " ]]; then
            seen[$icon]=1
            unique_icons+=("$icon")
        fi
    done
    
    if [ ${#unique_icons[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
        ICONS_JSON="["
        for icon in "${unique_icons[@]}"; do
            ICONS_JSON="$ICONS_JSON\"$icon\","
        done
        ICONS_JSON="${ICONS_JSON%,}]"
    fi
fi

# Output JSON
cat << EOF
{
  "binary_path": "$BINARY_PATH",
  "binary_name": "$BINARY_NAME",
  "display_name": "$DISPLAY_NAME",
  "desktop_entry": $DESKTOP_ENTRY,
  "icon_paths": $ICONS_JSON,
  "version": "$VERSION"
}
EOF
